channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Australian Open: Iga Swiatek is in total control during a 6-1, 6-0 rout of Emma Raducanu
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Everything came so easily for Iga Swiatek during a 6-1, 6-0 victory over Emma Raducanu on Saturday in the only Australian Open women's third-round match between two past Grand Slam champions — if you thought that meant it would be close, you'd have been rather wrong — tha
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Penguins' Nedeljkovic makes NHL history as he becomes 1st goalie with goal and assist in a game
item.description: Alex Nedeljkovic remembers admiring the way Marty Turco and Martin Brodeur handled the puck in his childhood.
item.dc:creator: Joe Yerdon, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Breanna Stewart scores first basket in Unrivaled history in debut of 3-on-3 women's league
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Unrivaled shined brightly on its opening night. The 3-on-3 women’s basketball league co-founded by WNBA stars Breanna Stewart and Napheesa Collier debuted Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nedeljkovic becomes 1st goalie with goal and assist, and has 40 saves as Penguins beat Sabres 5-2
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — Alex Nedeljkovic became the first goalie in NHL history to have a goal and an assist, and made 40 saves as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Buffalo Sabres 5-2 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE YERDON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sammy Sosa gets warm reception for his reconciliation with the Chicago Cubs
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Sammy Sosa jogged onto the stage, carrying an American flag. The crowd cheered wildly. It was just like old times — only Sosa was dressed in a suit, and the scene occurred in a downtown hotel ballroom instead of Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Charley Hoffman, Rico Hoey charge into the lead midway through The American Express
item.description: LA QUINTA, Calif. (AP) — Charley Hoffman knows his time on the PGA Tour is running short. He can feel every one of his 48 years whenever his troublesome back acts up, and he knows the recent reduction in tour cards will end most players’ careers well before they reach his age.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox exec calls Brady rumors "a never-ending, merry-go-round" of narratives
item.description: Even as Tom Brady goes through his first postseason and prepares to call his first Super Bowl as a television analyst in three weeks, rumors about his future continue to be rampant, much to the dismay of Fox Sports.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Titans hire Chiefs executive Mike Borgonzi as their general manager
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — The Tennessee Titans already had the No. 1 overall draft pick. Now, Mike Borgonzi will help them figure out what to do with that selection in April. The Titans announced Friday they hired the Kansas City assistant general manager as their 15th general manager.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Japanese ace Roki Sasaki to join Ohtani, Yamamoto with Los Angeles Dodgers
item.description: Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says in an Instagram post he intends to sign with the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Jimmy Butler returns from suspension, plays Friday for Miami against Denver
item.description: Jimmy Butler walked out of the Miami Heat locker room on Friday night wearing a Michael Jordan jersey.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Travis Kelce could call it quits if Chiefs pull off three-peat, ESPN star says
item.description: Travis Kelce has been in the NFL for well over a decade. While he remains productive, his age has prompted discussions about how soon he will walk away from the sport.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ravens, Bills brace for frigid temps and possible snow in AFC divisional round matchup
item.description: The hottest ticket for this weekend's NFL divisional round matchups will be played on the coldest field when the Buffalo Bills host the Baltimore Ravens Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dawn Staley's $25M extension is richest salary in women's college hoops history, South Carolina says
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Coach Dawn Staley received a contract extension on Friday that South Carolina said will make her the highest paid college women's basketball coach of all time at a total value of about $25 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-49ers star Dana Stubblefield denied bail ruling after rape conviction reversal
item.description: Defense attorneys are decrying a judge's finding that he lacks jurisdiction to grant Stubblefield bail following an appellate court decision to vacate his conviction and prison sentence.
item.dc:creator: Robert Salonga, Caelyn Pender, The Mercury News

item.title: Hall of Fame broadcaster Dick Vitale returns to the air
item.description: Legendary ESPN broadcaster Dick Vitale will be returning to air on Jan. 25 for the first time since 2023.
item.dc:creator: Alaina Papazian, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah's struggles at home continue with 5-3 loss to Rangers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club are having a difficult time during its longest homestand of the season. The New York Rangers scored three goals in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 5-3 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU baseball, softball picked to top RMAC in 2025
item.description: In the RMAC preseason coaches poll, both CMU Baseball and CMU softball were selected to top the conference.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: How to watch Stanford vs. UNC basketball in the Bay Area
item.description: (KRON) -- The Stanford Cardinal men's basketball team will face North Carolina in a cross-country ACC battle on Saturday. The game is being shown exclusively on KRON4. Stanford (11-6, 3-3 ACC) and UNC (12-6, 5-1 ACC) tip off at 11:15 a.m. PT. You can watch on KRON4 on stream on the CW app.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: March Madness will pay women's teams under a new structure approved by the NCAA
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Women's basketball teams finally will be paid for playing games in the NCAA Tournament each March just like the men have for years under a plan approved Wednesday at the NCAA convention.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SuperMotocross World Championship comes to San Diego: What to know
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will host the Monster Energy AMA Supercross Championship on Saturday, continuing the legacy of off-road motorsports in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: High-flying Plateau Valley Cowboys dominate Caprock in boys and girls basketball
item.description: With the Caprock Academy Eagles in town, Plateau Valley displayed their skill and athleticism in both girls and boys hoops.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: BYU bounces back with 85-69 win over Oklahoma State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team snapped a three-game losing skid with an 85-69 win over Oklahoma State Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bruins open 4-goal lead, add 2 short-handed empty-netters to beat Lightning 6-2
item.description: David Pastrnak had a goal and two assists and Parker Wotherspoon scored his first NHL goal on Tuesday night to help the Boston Bruins open a four-goal lead and hold on to beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-2.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: The team later confirmed Emil Heineman suffered an "upper-body" injury and is expected to be sidelined for three to four weeks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: Patrick Fishburn nearly wins first PGA Tour event
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Former BYU star Patrick Fishburn had visions of winning his first PGA Tour event. He was leading after two rounds, and one shot back after three rounds before ending up tied for sixth.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Texas man accused of sending Caitlin Clark violent messages on X: court docs
item.description: A Texas man is accused of sending sexually violent messages from his X account to Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark and then driving to Indianapolis, court documents reveal.
item.dc:creator: Matt Christy, Fox 5

item.title: Buccaneers lose to Commanders 23-20; Commanders first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days
item.description: Jayden Daniels ran for a critical first down to set up Zane Gonzalez's 37-yard field goal that clanged off the right upright and went through as time expired, and the Commanders beat the Tampa Bay Buccaneers 23-20 in an NFC wild-card game Sunday night for the franchise’s first playoff win in 6,945 d
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI AP Pro Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bronco's season comes to an end following 31-7 loss to Buffalo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Denver Broncos’ long-awaited playoff return ended Sunday in Upstate New York. After eight years away from the postseason, the Broncos found themselves in the spotlight, led by rookie quarterback Bo Nix.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Texans get 2 points on blocked extra point return vs. Chargers, 1st in NFL playoff history
item.description: Houston's D'Angelo Ross returned a blocked extra point for two points in the fourth quarter of the Texans' wild-card playoff victory over the Los Angeles Chargers on Saturday — the first such play in NFL postseason history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
